overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic metropolis. The player character crosses streets, navigates crowded sidewalks, ascends a stairway to an elevated plaza, and views towering skyscrapers adorned with massive holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with illuminated crosswalk

events.description: futuristic green sedan passes by on the left side of the crosswalk
finishes crossing yellow-striped crosswalk and steps onto sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the illuminated crosswalk and proceeding along the sidewalk beside a teal and red building

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan with glowing accents driving past the intersection

entered.detail: multi-story building with teal upper facade and red structural elements featuring barred windows
large illuminated advertisement showing animated neon content
tall modern street light casting bright white illumination on the crosswalk
broad yellow-striped pedestrian crossing with glowing green WALK text

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city intersection at night, with the camera crossing a glowing yellow crosswalk. A teal office building dominates the right side while a digital billboard glows in the distance. The player finishes crossing and continues along the concrete sidewalk as a futuristic sedan passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy city sidewalk beneath elevated transit line

events.description: camera follows a group of pedestrians moving in the same direction along the sidewalk
futuristic silver sports car with red taillights drives past on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk following a crowd, passing various pedestrians and street vendors

notable_agents.action: large person wearing white jacket with black X symbol walking ahead of camera
low-profile sports car with glowing red taillights cruising along the street

entered.detail: elevated orange and gray monorail or transit line running above the street
high-rise building with grid-patterned illuminated windows
yellow metal barrier separating the pedestrian walkway from the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a busy city sidewalk beneath an elevated transit structure, the camera follows a crowd including a distinctive person in a white jacket with a black X symbol. The teal building recedes into the distance while a silver sports car cruises past on the left, and the urban canyon reveals towering office blocks ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban alley leading to elevated stairway

events.description: turning corner into narrower street with small shops and less foot traffic
beginning to ascend wide blue concrete stairs to upper level

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrower street section with reduced foot traffic, then climbing a stairway to an elevated pedestrian level

notable_agents.action: person in gray vest and red pants ascending the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: small commercial establishment with bright neon signage and vending machines
teal building facade with distinctive circular porthole-style windows and red accents
wide stairway with teal painted walls and metal railings leading upward

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower urban alley with a corner store visible ahead. The camera passes a distinctive building with circular windows on the right before beginning to ascend a wide blue concrete stairway, following another pedestrian upward while the street level falls away behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with panoramic city views

events.description: emerging from stairs onto open elevated walkway with expansive view of skyscrapers and holographic ads
descending gentle ramp on elevated walkway while looking up at towering advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated plaza, frequently looking up at towering skyscrapers and massive holographic advertisements

entered.detail: large circular neon sign advertising 'EL GUAPO' with chrome skull graphic and purple lighting
tall palm tree growing on the elevated concrete plaza
massive tower covered in digital screens and holographic projections reaching into the night sky
low wall with blue paint marking the edge of the upper walkway
tall vertical holographic advertisement showing a figure in red against the dark sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an expansive elevated plaza, the camera reveals a breathtaking view of the cyberpunk cityscape with massive holographic billboards including the prominent 'El Guapo' sign. The player walks past palm trees and descends a ramp while gazing up at towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements that illuminate the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling street-level intersection up into a sprawling, neon-lit elevated plaza. It begins by crossing a glowing yellow crosswalk beside a teal office building, moving along a concrete sidewalk as a futuristic sedan passes by. As the camera follows a crowd beneath an elevated transit structure, the urban canyon opens up to reveal towering office blocks and a silver sports car cruising past. The scene then shifts into a narrower alley, passing a building with circular windows before ascending a wide blue concrete stairway that lifts the perspective above the street. Finally, the camera emerges onto an expansive plaza filled with palm trees, revealing a breathtaking cityscape dominated by massive holographic billboards and skyscrapers that illuminate the night sky.
